title: Synesthesia Eval: Audio Visualization Quality Dataset
description: A curated dataset of ~123 audio/video clips for evaluating audio visualization quality. Each clip is rated on sync quality, visual-audio alignment, aesthetic quality, and motion smoothness by an automated labeler (Google Gemini). Designed for benchmarking audio-reactive visualization systems.
notes: Part of the SYNESTHESIA project - AI-enhanced psychoacoustic audio visualization.
